Score recovery

Not enough data yet
Requires one full ingestion cycle after action logged. 3 themes in cycle — results expected 21 Jul 2026.
Score movement after an action is correlation, not causation.

Ingestion latency — last 12 weeks

AI quality — between system and product
Leading proxy
AI confidence score (mean)
Mean model confidence across all classified comments · this month · 47,832 comments
Current 83.4%
Target 91%
7.6pp below target
Confidence is a proxy only. A miscalibrated model can be confidently wrong. Do not report this as accuracy.
Lagging
AI classification accuracy
Agreement with clinical reviewer on labelled validation set · target ≥ 91% · quarterly
No baseline yet
Requires a labelled clinical validation set. Until it exists, this metric is unknown — not zero.
↑ Initiate validation set
AI layer build sequence
Baseline first, AI second — never skip the sequence
STAGE 01
Signal Detection
Flags wards deteriorating beyond threshold vs prior period. Shows: threshold, % change, comment count.
BUILT
STAGE 02
Narrative Summary
Plain-English readout per persona. Must cite underlying numbers — no invented claims. ✦ AI provenance always marked.
IN PROGRESS
STAGE 03
Predictive Analytics
Forecasts wards at risk of breaching threshold. Requires confidence intervals and full traceability.
NOT STARTED
Do not activate without ≥ 3 ingestion cycles of history. Running it before that is theatre, not insight.
Excluded
AI confidence % standalone Accuracy before validation set exists

DPIA

DSP Toolkit

Adapter build
5
Live
A trust in DPIA review is not a live trust. Each gate takes 2–4 weeks.

Trust Gate stage Ingestion Adapter Status
